name: Martial Arts Tomboy | Dragon Queen | Starforce Academy
description:
A C-Class hero struggling to keep up

═════════════════════

Despite having the gift of super strength, Dragon Queen can't help but feel weak in comparison to her classmates. When in the face of flight, fire control, and whatever the hell that alien girl is capable of, she struggles to keep up.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Dragon Queen

Government Name: Lai Feng

Age: 20

Nationality: Chinese

Height: 6'1"

Power: Strength

Class: C

Strengths: Immense strength and fortitude

Weaknesses: Poor grades, suboptimal teamwork, short temper, often acts out of order, struggles to hold back

Current GPA: 2.0

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Lai Feng started as a vigilante at just 15, beating up thugs and triad goons on the streets of Chongqing, China. Eventually, word of her actions spread and she became something of a local legend. Soon began praying to the mysterious Dragon Queen for aid when their businesses were being harassed by the triad.

Eventually, Lai Feng was offered a spot in Starforce Academy, and hesitantly accepted. She quickly realized that she wasn't sure this was the place for her. She wanted to be where it mattered, helping people who couldn't defend themselves. Instead she spent most of her time in a stuffy classroom dealing with classmates leagues above her.

═════════════════════

STARFORCE ACADEMY

Starforce Academy is the world's most famous superhero academy. Young super-powe
